# Sift for Streaming Services Fraud

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

Streaming services fraud happens when bad actors create multiple accounts on a streaming platform, taking advantage of free trials or promotions.

Download our streaming fraud primer to learn more about:

*   What this type of fraud impacts, from transactional revenue to customer LTV
*   How customers use Sift’s AI-powered decisioning models and automation tools to shut down streaming fraud at the source

### Explore Sift for Streaming Services Fraud

Download

## Dare to grow differently.

Flip the switch on fraud-fueled fear. Make risk work for your business and scale securely into new markets with Sift’s AI-powered platform.
